reviews.comment:
Febrero 2022. un dia no hay infinia pero si super y al otro dia hay infinia pero no super y con la infinia andubo peor la camioneta. la verdad que con ese comentario ya es malo para para agregar que pedi agua y me mandaron a un camping el playero muy maleducado lo salvo el compañero que si me atendio como correaponde!!!! Lastima un lugar muy turistico con una sola estacion de servicio!!!&$^#$#%&#*#^$

(Translated by Google)
February 2022. One day there was no Infinia but there was Super, and the next day there was Infinia but not Super, and the truck ran worse with the Infinia. Honestly, that comment alone is bad enough, and to top it off, I asked for water and they sent me to a campground. The attendant was very rude; only my colleague, who actually served me properly, saved me! What a shame, such a touristy place with only one gas station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXM0p2ZDVnRRAB
